problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: Combining Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
